uncertain_or_unreadable: All four blocks of text are written in Ethiopic/Ge'ez script and I cannot read or transliterate their content.

Some characters in the script (e.g. circled glyphs such as ⊕, ⊗, ⊙, ⊕⊙, and the character that looks like 7 with a dot, which resembles a Ge'ez numeral) appear in the text but I cannot identify them precisely.
